caption: I showed this to my girlfriend and she literally said no way. Then a random guy on a flight told me to try Freedom DNS and I finally got why people hype it. One tap and the internet felt faster, cleaner, and less creepy on public networks. I even showed my grandma and she was shook. Not sponsored, just surprised it actually works this well. #privacy #dns #mobileinternet #lifehack #cyberhygiene
title: Freedom DNS - UGC Story Vibe
